build.description: Optional build-from-source configuration. When present, the build-runner installs the dev toolchain WITH lifecycle scripts, runs the build command, and packs the BUILT output. When absent the strategy runs its default source-republish path (install --ignore-scripts + pack) unchanged. Authored by the curated workflow, never by the untrusted source repo.

packageManager.description: Pins the JS package manager: npm, yarn, or pnpm, optionally with a version pin (e.g. "yarn@1.22.22", "pnpm@11.9.0"). Empty means the build-runner reads the repo's package.json "packageManager" field via corepack.

installScripts.description: When true, runs the dependency install WITH lifecycle scripts (the dev toolchain a real build needs). When false the install runs with scripts disabled (the source-republish posture).

buildCommand.description: The build step run after install, e.g. "npm run build". Empty means no build step (install + pack only).

packCommand.description: Overrides the artifact-pack step. Empty means the strategy's default pack (e.g. "npm pack"), which packs into a clean dedicated directory.
